title: Epoxy Resin Floors with Custom Logos - Elite South Texas
content:
Well-known Brands
Well-Known Brands may require specialty flooring in a variety of interior and exterior spaces, including retail areas, offices, manufacturing and warehouses. Our flooring systems offer increased durability and enhance the aesthetic appeal. These surfaces can incorporate custom colors, designs and logos to match your brand. They are stain and chemical resistant as well as offer protection from heavy traffic and machinery.
Advantages
CSI Division 9 – Finishes: Interior – Resinous flooring
Wide selection of colors, patterns and other customization options including logos
Highly abrasion and chemical resistant
Coefficient of friction (COF) levels meet or exceed ADA Flat & Inclined Surfaces, OSHA and NFPA recommendations
Slip resistant even when wet
Easy to clean and maintain
Quick installation options for minimal downtime
Exceeds durability requirements for heavy traffic and equipment
More cost effective than VCT, tile, carpet and other conventional flooring
Antimicrobial and antibacterial
VOC free – CA 01350 air quality compliant
CSI Division 3 – Concrete: Interior or exterior – Cementitious polymer modified finishes
More cost effective than removal and replacement of concrete
Wide selection of colors, patterns, textures and other customization options including logos
Extreme temperature resistance (hot & cold)
Exceeds durability requirements for heavy traffic and equipment
Quick installation options for minimal downtime
Mold and mildew resistant
UV stable
Easy to maintain and stain resistant
Resistant to de-icing chemicals and salts
Polymer Modified Cement
Polymer Modified Cement
Virtually unlimited
Contact an Elite South Texas technical representative for applicability
